site.name: Cointrack
site.description: Personal & business finance management — banks, receipts, invoices and iDoklad in one place.

footer.tagline: Finance assistant for personal and business accounts. Android, iOS, web.
footer.copyright: © {year} Cointrack. Your data hosted in the EU.
footer.psd2_disclaimer: Cointrack is not a bank or payment institution. Bank connections are powered by licensed PSD2 providers.

hero.title: Stop retyping receipts into spreadsheets.
hero.subtitle: Cointrack pulls transactions straight from your bank, scans receipts into the system and tells you how much you've spent on fuel. For personal budgeting and business accounting alike.
hero.cta_note: No credit card to start. Android, web, iOS coming soon.

trust.title: Bank connections via regulated PSD2 providers

features.title: Everything you need, in one place.
features.subtitle: Personal finance, business accounting, scanning, backups. One account across Android, web and iOS.
features.banks_desc: Transactions from Fio, ČSOB, KB, Air Bank and 2500+ EU banks via PSD2. No manual CSV imports.
features.ai_desc: Snap a receipt or upload an invoice PDF. Gemini AI reads the merchant, items, VAT and categorizes it.
features.invoices_desc: Issued and received invoices, SPAYD QR payments, iDoklad sync, ZIP export for your accountant.
features.stats_desc: Where did you spend the most? How are housing expenses changing month over month? Charts and categories.
features.profiles_desc: One account, multiple profiles. Freelancer, LLC, household budget — each with its own accounts, categories, ID and VAT numbers.
features.security_desc: AES-256 encrypted DB, biometrics, encrypted Google Drive backups, EU hosting.

how_it_works.title: From install to first sync in 3 minutes.
how_it_works.step1_text: Android on Google Play, iOS and web coming soon. Sign up with email.
how_it_works.step2_text: Click, authorize in your bank's app. Transactions are pulled 90 days back.
how_it_works.step3_text: Subsequent syncs run automatically. Just snap receipts and watch the charts.

cta.title: Start with your personal budget. Or invoices for your business.
cta.subtitle: 14 days free, no credit card. Cancel anytime in one click.

idoklad.title: iDoklad
idoklad.subtitle_pre: Sync incoming and outgoing invoices from iDoklad.cz. Invoices appear in the
idoklad.no_profile: Pick a profile in the top-left corner first.
idoklad.disconnect_confirm: Really disconnect iDoklad? Already downloaded invoices will stay.
idoklad.form_desc: The server stores Client Secret encrypted (AES-GCM). The browser never sees it — iDoklad API calls run on the backend.
idoklad.fill_credentials: Please fill in both Client ID and Client Secret.
idoklad.guide_title: How to get iDoklad API access
idoklad.guide_step2: Settings → API keys → Generate new (type Client Credentials)
idoklad.guide_step3: Copy Client ID and Client Secret and paste them above
idoklad.guide_step4: Click "Save & test" — then "🔄 Sync" to download invoices
idoklad.guide_security: Security: Client Secret is encrypted on the server after saving (AES-256-GCM) and never appears in the browser or network requests in plaintext.

This action cannot be undone.

for_business.meta_description: Cointrack for freelancers, LLCs and small business owners. iDoklad integration, Fio payments, accountant export, industry-tailored categories.
for_business.title: Stop wrestling with invoices and Excel.
for_business.subtitle: For freelancers, LLCs and small business owners. Scan a receipt, issue an invoice, send to your accountant. All in one app, connected to your bank and iDoklad.

use_cases.title: Open accounts in the morning, invoice by evening
use_cases.text: Transactions from ČSOB, KB or Fio are synced automatically. Lunch receipts photographed in 5 seconds. Issue a client invoice on the way home.

use_cases.title: Accountant gets a quarterly ZIP
use_cases.text: Export of all invoices (received + issued) and receipts as a ZIP. Includes CSV with variable symbol, company ID, amounts and PDF links. Accountant only calls when something's missing.

use_cases.title: Pay invoices directly
use_cases.text: Invoice arrives, click Pay, Fio API sends the payment. Authorize in Smartbanking SMS or push. No copying IBAN and variable symbol.

use_cases.title: Know your cash flow in real time
use_cases.text: Dashboard shows incoming client payments this month, what you've spent on goods, and upcoming due dates.

for_business.focuses_subtitle: When creating a business profile, you pick a focus. Cointrack seeds relevant expense and income categories so you don't have to invent anything.

focuses.name: Hospitality and restaurants
focuses.categories: Ingredients, beverages, staff, utilities, kitchen equipment

focuses.name: Healthcare
focuses.categories: Lab, medical supplies, medications, office rent

focuses.name: Construction
focuses.categories: Materials, tools, fuel, PPE, equipment rental

focuses.name: Agriculture
focuses.categories: Seeds, fuel, machinery repairs, vet, insurance

focuses.name: Education
focuses.categories: Course materials, venue rental, lecturer fees

integrations.name: iDoklad
integrations.description: Add ClientID and ClientSecret from your iDoklad dashboard, Cointrack handles the rest. Issue an invoice, push to iDoklad, download PDF.

integrations.name: Fio API
integrations.description: Token from Fio internet banking. Read transactions and submit payments. Authorize in Smartbanking.

integrations.name: PSD2 Open Banking
integrations.description: ČSOB, KB, ČS, Air Bank, Raiffeisen, UniCredit, mBank and 2500+ others. Through regulated AIS providers.

integrations.name: ARES
integrations.description: Type a company ID, ARES returns the name, address, VAT number. Business details filled in 2 seconds.

integrations.name: Pohoda XML
integrations.description: Export receipts and invoices in the format used by Pohoda accounting software. Everything required for the tax return.

integrations.name: Google Drive
integrations.description: Automatic backups with AES-256-GCM encryption. Export of accounting documents to a separate folder for accountant sharing.

for_business.cta_subtitle: Unlimited business profiles, all integrations, shared accountant access, priority support.

features_page.meta_description: AI receipt scanning, bank account connections, invoices, iDoklad, QR payments, statistics and more.
features_page.title: What Cointrack does.
features_page.subtitle: From a manual Excel sheet to a complete finance system. Everything you actually use — nothing extra.

sections.title: Bank account connections
paragraphs: Through PSD2 Open Banking you connect to Fio, Česká spořitelna, ČSOB, KB, Air Bank, Raiffeisen and 2500+ other EU banks. No CSV imports, no retyping.
Authorization happens in your bank's app — we never see your credentials. Data flows through a regulated PSD2 provider approved by the central bank.
Transactions are pulled up to 90 days back. Automatic sync at 1 / 3 / 6 / 12 hour intervals.

sections.title: AI receipt and invoice scanning
paragraphs: Snap a café receipt or upload a supplier PDF. Google Gemini AI extracts merchant, company ID, date, total, VAT and individual items.
The system detects whether it's a receipt or invoice and files it correctly. It links the receipt to a bank transaction — no input from you needed.
Supports Czech and English. Works on short, four-year-old photos.

sections.title: Invoices — incoming and outgoing
paragraphs: Tracking incoming and outgoing invoices with a due-date overview. Variable symbol, IBAN, total, VAT — all in one place.
SPAYD QR code is generated automatically. Open any banking app, scan, pay.
For Fio Bank: send the payment directly via Fio API — the invoice is paid before you close it. Authorize in Fio Smartbanking.

sections.title: Personal and business profiles under one account
paragraphs: One Cointrack account, multiple profiles. Family budget, freelancer, side gig, LLC — each with its own accounts, categories, VAT settings, company ID and VAT number.
Business profile comes with industry-tailored category presets: hospitality, IT, healthcare, construction, education, transport, real estate, agriculture and more.
Accountant access: share invoice and receipt exports without exposing your personal finances.

sections.title: iDoklad and Pohoda integration
paragraphs: iDoklad API connection — issue an invoice in Cointrack, push it to iDoklad in one click. Add Client ID and Client Secret, the app handles the rest.
Pohoda XML export for traditional accounting systems. ZIP export for an accountant who wants everything in one folder.

sections.title: Statistics that actually mean something
paragraphs: Expense categories ranked by spend. Monthly and quarterly comparisons. Donut and trend charts.
Category budgets — alerts when you're under the line. Planned payments, debtors, savings goals.

sections.title: Backups and sync across devices
paragraphs: Automatic Google Drive backups — AES-256 encrypted with your password. Even if Google opened the file, nothing readable would come out.
Sync across Android, iOS and web. Add an invoice on your laptop, send the QR from your phone.
ZIP export with everything needed for device migration or for your accountant.

sections.title: Security as priority
paragraphs: Database encrypted with SQLCipher (AES-256-GCM). Biometric unlock (Face ID, fingerprint). API keys and tokens in Android Keystore / iOS Keychain.
All servers in the Czech Republic (WEDOS / Hetzner DE). GDPR-compliant, EU data stays in the EU.
No data sharing with third parties. No ads. No Facebook pixels.

sections.title: Loyalty cards and barcodes
paragraphs: Scan loyalty cards from your wallet — Tesco Clubcard, Rohlík, Alza Plus. In-store, open the card in the app, point it at the scanner.
Dominant logo color is extracted automatically — cards look like the real thing.

sections.title: Smart home friendly
paragraphs: Home-screen widget with account balance. Quick receipt upload from ShareSheet. Planned payments as reminders.
Android Auto support for quick balance display in the car.

sections.title: Full localization in Czech and English
paragraphs: Language switcher right in the app. No new instance created when switching.
English variant for foreign colleagues or while traveling.

about.meta_description: Who stands behind Cointrack and why we're building a finance app for the Czech market.
about.title: Why Cointrack exists.
about.intro: Most finance apps are either foreign and don't know Fio Bank, or Czech and look like 2015. We wanted something that does both and looks good on phone, tablet and laptop.
about.for_whom_text: For people who use multiple Czech and foreign accounts, occasionally issue or receive an invoice, and occasionally want to know where their money flows. For freelancers who must track VAT and due dates themselves. For families who want to understand why this year's electricity bill is higher.
about.how_item1: — we read your data from your existing bank. For connections we use licensed PSD2 providers.
about.how_item2: — servers in the Czech Republic and Germany. Data doesn't leave the EU; GDPR is the baseline.
about.how_item3: — database (Postgres), encryption (SQLCipher), UI framework (Compose). No black boxes.
about.how_item4: — your data is yours. Not the product.
about.roadmap_q2: : Android ✓, web beta, Czech bank PSD2 connections
about.roadmap_q4: : Public API, export to more accounting systems

contact.meta_description: Email support@cointrack.cz. We reply within 1 business day.
contact.title: Contact.
contact.subtitle: The easiest way is email. We reply within 1 business day, usually much sooner.
contact.support_desc: Usage questions, bug reports, feature requests.
contact.sales_desc: Team tier, custom integrations, white-label solutions.
contact.security_desc: Responsible disclosure of security vulnerabilities. PGP key on request.
contact.operator_line1: Cointrack — operator will be filled in after entity registration.

pricing.meta_description: Free for personal use, Business for freelancers and companies. 14 days free trial, no credit card.
pricing.title: Pricing without surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Start free, pay monthly, cancel anytime. No contract penalties, no setup fees.
pricing.vat_note: Prices include VAT for the Czech Republic. B2B pricing shows after entering your VAT ID at checkout.
pricing.yearly_title: Pay yearly and get 2 months free.
pricing.yearly_desc: Personal CZK 690/year, Business CZK 1990/year, Organization CZK 3990/year.
pricing.free_desc: For personal use, locally on Android.
pricing.personal_desc: Personal profile across devices (Android + web + iOS).
pricing.business_desc: For freelancers and companies. Business profiles.
pricing.organization_desc: For companies with multiple members and shared accountant.
free_features: Receipt OCR (bring your own Gemini API key)
personal_features: Cloud sync across Android, web and iOS
Bank connections via PSD2 (ČSOB, KB, ČS, Air Bank…)
Receipt OCR without your own API key
organization_features: Invite multiple members to your organization
Share individual bank accounts with members
Accountant interface with bulk ZIP export

faq.a: Yes, anytime via Settings → Subscription → Cancel. You'll keep access until the end of the paid period. No penalties, no forms.

faq.q: What happens to my data if I downgrade to Free?
faq.a: Data stays. Business profiles switch to read-only — you can still view and export invoices, just can't add new ones. They unlock again whenever you return to Business.
Signing up for Personal, Business or Organization gives full access for 14 days without a card. On day 14 we send a reminder — if you continue, add a card; otherwise you switch automatically to Free.

faq.q: Is Cointrack registered with the central bank?
faq.a: Cointrack is not a payment institution or bank. For bank connections via PSD2 we use licensed AIS providers (GoCardless Bank Account Data, Enable Banking) holding EU licenses.
WEDOS (Hluboká nad Vltavou, Czech Republic) for database and files. Web is on Vercel edge (Frankfurt). Backups on Backblaze B2 in the EU. No data leaves the European Union.

faq.q: What's the difference between personal and business profiles?
faq.a: Personal profile has no VAT, no need for company ID, fits in Free. Business profile has company ID/VAT, industry-tailored categories (hospitality, IT, healthcare…), iDoklad and Pohoda integration, and is part of the Business tier.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Your account and subscription.
settings.default_account_desc: Default account for scanned and uploaded receipts/invoices (except cash — those always go to the Cash account). The setting is stored locally in your browser and applies only to the currently selected profile.
settings.mobile_desc: Download the Android app for full functionality (receipt scanning, invoices, OCR, loyalty cards, Pohoda export).
settings.gdpr_desc: Under GDPR (Article 20), you have the right to download all of your data in a machine-readable format (JSON). The file contains profiles, accounts, transactions, receipts, invoices, loyalty cards, etc.
settings.delete_account_desc: Under GDPR (Article 17), you have the right to complete data erasure. Your account will be marked, and after 30 days all data will be permanently deleted. During this period, you can still cancel the deletion (by signing back in).
settings.delete_confirm:
Are you sure you want to delete your account?

• Account will be marked for deletion
• After 30 days all data will be permanently erased
• During this period you can sign back in and cancel
• You'll be signed out from all devices immediately
settings.delete_pending_requested: Deletion requested on {date}. Data will be permanently erased on
settings.delete_pending_changed_mind: If you've changed your mind, you can cancel:
settings.delete_pending_desc: Deletion was requested on {date}. Data will be permanently erased on {until}. If you change your mind, you can cancel:
settings.logout_desc: You'll be signed out of the web. The mobile app stays signed in.
